title: End Unleashed
description: No resource pack required! Discover new dragons, mobs from Minecraft Dungeons, and more! Optimized for SMP & faithful to vanilla mechanics.
body:
# End Unleashed
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/bl0OyY4.png)

End Unleashed is a datapack that adds different new **animated 3D mobs**, mostly to the End, but also to the Nether and the Overworld, with custom attacks. **No resource pack required!**

# Performance optimized
The datapack is optimized to prevent server & client lag:
- Every custom mob will despawn if no one is nearby
- Their models don't cause lag
- No resource pack required, fully server side

# Mobs list

## The Great Hog
![The Great Hog preview](https://i.imgur.com/WrEzU0A.gif)

Coming from the Minecraft Movie, it will use a smash attack on the player, and can be found in bastions _(it spawns every 5 minutes to a random player located in a bastion, except if it had been looted before)_
### Attack
- Smash attack, throwing you several blocks up & dealing you 4 hearts damage minimum
### Health
- 50 hearts

### Difficulty
- Medium

### Location
- Nether, bastion

### Rarity
- Uncommon

## The Wraith
![The Wraith preview](https://i.imgur.com/JAKpq6A.gif)

Coming from Minecraft Dungeon, it appears in Mansion occasionaly _(you have a chance to encounter one every 5 minutes if you are in a mansion, unless you are not alone, it will avoid you)_
### Attacks
- It will summon blue fire at your position (you get a hint when he is about to summon it)
- It will summon stray (if too many are close, it will stop summoning)
- It can teleport around you
- It can throw several fireballs at the time (they don't cause grief except on burnable surface)
### Health
- 40 hearts

### Difficulty
- Medium

### Location
- Overworld, woodland mansion

### Rarity
- Uncommon

## The Endersent
![The Endersent preview](https://i.imgur.com/lAXud3Q.gif)

Coming from Minecraft Dungeon aswell, it is guarding End Cities _(it will spawn every 7 minutes near or inside an end city)_
### Attack
- Regular attack
### Health
- 40 hearts

### Difficulty
- Easy

### Location
- End, end city

### Rarity
- Common

## The deadly dragon
![The Deadly Dragon preview](https://i.imgur.com/n9fqgOO.gif)

You can find it in End cities, really rarely. Its loot are a lot of xp, and its size is 1/4 the main end island.
### Attacks
- It can summon tornadoes
- It can summon endermites
- It will charge you but will be hard to reach without a long range weapon due to its size
### Health
- 150 hearts

### Difficulty
- Medium

### Location
- End, end city

### Rarity
- Rare

## The resurrected dragon
![The Resurrected Dragon spawning preview](https://i.imgur.com/EBH6E0S.gif)

It can randomly get out of the ground in the End, on the main island or anywhere else, every 7 minutes. Its loot are a lot of xp.
### Attacks
- Phase 1
  - it will fly closer to the ground and start breathing fire
  - it will charge you
- Phase 2
  - it will grab TNT and throw it at you
### Health
- 150 hearts

### Difficulty
- Hard

### Location
- End, everywhere

### Rarity
- Uncommon

# Operator commands

- To manually spawn a mob, do **/function mob name:summon**
  - To kill it, do **/function mob name:kill**
